entry.title: Re: Performance Tips: Getting the most out of your Web Intelligence Processing Servers
entry.content:
Thank you @ramprasun_sribhasyam 

My guess is this workflow isn't forcing the process to use much, or very little, of the bits that require a single thread. It looks to me like the process is being allowed to run in parallel across multiple cores, but this is really, in my view, due to the workflow. I think you'd experience a different behaviour with more users and/or more document sessions (user accounts won't make any difference). Hope this helps you, and/or others try to understand what might be going on. All the best. Matthew

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Advanced Formula
entry.content:
@pragi2028 

DATA([d/Measures] = "Rate_Increase_Dollar") = (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Salary") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Rate_Increase_Percent"))/100

This can only work if both Salary and Rate % are stored on same combination for other dimensions in the model. If your rates are stored at other intersection then salary then specify those dimension values within the resultlookup.

Please post your data intersection from model for both Salary and Rate % sample records.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Good afternoon community,Error in integration Inbound Delivery to TM
entry.content:
Good afternoon community,

I have the following problem, a scenario in TM embedded, I create the inbound delivery and the document does not raise the TM view. I check the integration log in the program /SCMTMS/CHK_DOC_INT_INT_TM_INTEGR, and the system indicates that the control key does not exist, but I check and yes this the delivery type, shipping point, shipping condition and other correct data. I attach screenshots.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - PAL APL insufficient privileges
entry.content: Note that you will only see the PAL check box as shown in the response if you have the HANA Script Server enabled via Tenant Configuration ( steps here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/9f804b8efa8043539289f42f372c4862/287194276a7d4d778ec98fdde5f61335.html?q=script%20server )

entry.title: How to create Authorization Group ID to define allowlists for CDS View Extraction in S4HANA 2402?
entry.content:
We're trying to "Integrate CDS Views Using SAP Datasphere" to S4HANA2402. But we're stuck in one of the prerequisites - "You have created at least one authorization group ID with a CDS view allowlist. (To do so, proceed as follows: In your configuration environment, use the search function to open the following activity: Define Allowlists for CDS View Extraction.  When creating the communication arrangement, the communication user is assigned to an authorization group. CDS views that are not part of this authorization group will not be visible in in the CDS_EXTRACTION folder (the folder that is used to add source objects to a replication flow)".

the below link does not help "https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-create-an-authorization-group-for-quot-define-allowlists-for-cds/qaq-p/12664365ommunity".

Please help where and how to create Authorization Group ID to define allowlists for CDS View Extraction in S4HANA 2402?

Thanks

Salman

entry.title: Re: Building a Custom SAP Gateway Service with SEGW
entry.content:
Hi @Jelena 

Can you please provide any content on how to do this in S/4HANA?

entry.title: Information about SAP Business ByDesign Partner Tenant Delivery
entry.content:
SAP Business ByDesign Partner Tenant Delivery status.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Information about SAP Business ByDesign Partner Tenan...
entry.content: Partners need to contact SAP TDD (SAP Test Demo Development Licenses for SAP Partner) Team by sending an e-mail To: tdd@sap.com in order to know about Partner tenant Delivery.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM - KPI is inactive error in BPMon
entry.content:
Hello,

I would first suggest you ensure the Required SAP Notes are implemented at the latest version on the SAP Business Suite systems.   Check in sm37 for CRBPA:DC_CONTROLLER and CRBPA:AUTODISCOVERY job logs to see if there are any errors reported there or mentions of the 'inactive' KPIs.  Correct any errors, if you are able and re-check problem.

If problem remains, create a support case at SAP and provide full details of your checks and, if possible, access to your Cloud ALM tenant and R/3 connection/maintained credentials for SAP Business Suite system.

entry.title: Re: GOITEM-SGTXT Mandatory MIGO
entry.content:
Control at movement type level!

For 101 and 121- check SGTXT is an required entry in SPRO - MM- IM & PI- Setting for Goods Movements- Field Selection per Mvt Type

entry.title: Any explain me bapi from ? Why we use ? When we use?
Incorrect Quantities in custom analytical query
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a query that displays a lot of SD information (sales order, outbound delivery, billing document etc.). However, the query does report the incorrect sales order quantities and outbound delivery quantities. See screenshot below. 

I used the following fields/elements in the query: I_SalesOrderItemCube.OrderQuantity and _I_OutboundDeliveryItem.ActualDeliveryQuantity. 

What is going on here? Can someone offer any help and/or solution?

Kind regards,

 

Floyd

entry.title: Re: Account with formula, does not show all data. SAP Ana...
entry.content:
@RafaelMachado 

In the formula for Ajuste_Anual_Feb change the RESULTLOOKUP()  to LOOKUP() and it should be fine.

 

Please close the thread if its helpful by accepting the answer.

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics cloud live connection exclude hierarchy...
entry.content: Exclude  Amortization in source view or you can script (read out hierarchy and exclude levels that you don't need)

entry.title: Re: Issue with BADI 'BADI_WCM_WCA_001'
entry.content: .I have the same issue . Did you solved it?

entry.title: Re: bulk items and subcontracting PO
entry.content:
Hi  @missel  

The SAP Learning group helps you to develop the knowledge, grow your skills, and  future-proof your career. Here you can ask questions and collaborate with other learners to reach your learning goals and to prepare for your SAP Certification exams. 

It looks like your question is not related to learning materials we published on our SAP Learning platform and while the topic you addressed  isn't specifically covered here and since it can hardly be answered without in-depth implementation knowledge, I can point you to several excellent resources to help find an answer to your question.

 

I would like to encourage you to post your  question to a our SAP Community where you can directly exchange with experienced experts with project Background -  SAP Community is a public space where anyone can start discussions and questions are answered by anyone. SAP Community enables professionals across the globe to connect, exchange information, engage, and receive recognition for your achievements. This inclusive and receptive environment welcomes all individuals who want to seek help and share knowledge about SAP software and solutions.

If you need help, and your issue is specific to the standard functionality of your SAP solution, contact SAP Product Support using the channel listed below which best suits your business impact

 

If you need help, and your issue is specific to the standard functionality of your SAP solution, contact SAP Product Support using the channel listed on our our Get support site.

 

Please always feel free to come back to our SAP Learning group to ask your questions and collaborate with other learners to reach your learning goals and to prepare for your SAP Certification exams.

However, for your particular question, I'd recommend the resources above.

Therefore, I close this thread.

 

I hope this helps, and best of luck!

Margit

entry.title: ABAP Auto Complet in Eclipse
entry.content:
While typing "LOO" the autocompletion suggests "LOOP", and than pressing on Tab complete it to "LOOP" and suggests "LOOP AT", and than another click on the Tab keyboard complete it to "LOOP AT",

But... no completion for " LOOP AT ... ... ... ENDLOOP." (while in LOGON editor it works good).

Is there an option to fix it ?

entry.title: Session attribute set to false in SAP PCO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a problem with PCo creating multiple sessions in MII. Every time that PCo sends a notification, a session is created. we have very huge number of session created at SAP MII side whenever there is any notification set from PCO side.

 

My question is.. is this behavior normal in PCo? (creating a session and not closing it every time a notification is sent to MII) or there is any configuration to set the session attribute while calling the MII webservice (WSDL) in PCO. 

we are using SAP PCO 15.5.1.5 version. 

got this link - Pco 2.3 creating multiple sessions in MII - SAP Community but looks like its an old post and not able to see the attribute also.

Quick response is appreciated.

 

Regards,

Ankit Gupta

entry.title: Re: Update Crystal Report Field Property data source

entry.title: Re: Enter valid tax code

Hi @Rufus7 
Can you please share the learning journey / exercise (title /URL) where you faced this problem?
Kind regrds
Margit

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Advanced Formula
entry.content:
@N1kh1l

Please find the sample data from model where the Rate % is user input and the Rate increase should be calculated based on that 

 

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = (BASEMEMBER([d/Date].[h/YQM], "(all)"))
MEMBERSET [d/Measures]=("Salary","Rate_Increase_Percent","Rate_Increase_Dollar")
MEMBERSET [d/Hiring_Date] = (BASEMEMBER([d/Hiring_Date].[h/YQM] ,"(all)" ))
IF [d/Hiring_Date].[p/YEAR] = "2023" THEN
IF [d/Hiring_Date].[p/MONTHDESC] = ("Dec", "Nov", "Oct") THEN
//No Cal
ELSE
DATA([d/Measures] = "Rate_Increase_Dollar") =  RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Salary") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Rate_Increase_Percent")
ENDIF
ENDIF
 
IF [d/Hiring_Date].[p/YEAR] != ("2024", "2023") THEN
DATA([d/Measures] ="Rate_Increase_Dollar") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Salary") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Rate_Increase_Percent")
ENDIF
 
Please find the full logic above 
Thanks for the reply !

entry.title: SAP Central Finance – How to active AIF bgRFC in your S/4HANA Central Finance?
entry.content:
In this blog I would like to give you an overview, which steps are required to activate background RFC (bgRFC) for the AIF processing in your S/4HANA Central Finance system. 

The SAP Application Interface Framework (AIF) is used for the asynchronous processing of documents transferred from a source system. In the SAP AIF different runtimes for processing are supported. So far the classic “background jobs generated by the XML runtime using jobs with queued bgRFC” was the only supported variant in SAP S/4HANA Central Finance. Starting from S/4HANA 2023 you can also switch to the AIF runtime “Background jobs generated by the XML runtime” to process AIF messages for the replication object for FI/CO postings. 

What needs to be done to active bgRFC?
In the Central Finance section of the IMG there is the folder “AIF Runtime Configuration”. In this folder all required activities can be found. I will describe each of the activities in more detail and start with the activity “Assign Default bgRFC Subprocess to Replication Objects”.

Before you start, you should decide, on which granularity you would like handle the processing of the AIF messages. You have to set up at least one default subprocess. Better would be if you define one default subprocess per replication object and additional subprocesses on finer granularity.

From our internal testing we realized that the level of initial load group is a good granularity for subprocesses, because it is not generating to much overhead for subprocess maintenance, activation etc., but it allows you to stop the AIF processing without stopping the processing for too many logical system/ company codes  combinations at once.

Step 1: Define Process and Subprocesses

First of all you have to define a process and then subprocesses for the process. To do so use transaction: /AIF/CUST. Here you navigate to System Configuration -> Configure AIF bgRFC Runtime -> Define Process. Next step is to define at least one subprocess for the newly defined Process using Define Subprocess.

Here you have an example of the process configuration we use in our internal test system. You see that we defined a separate subprocess per logical system and initial load group and named the subprocess accordingly. The RFC destination and the queue prefixes can be the same for different subprocesses.

You only have to ensure, that the queue prefixes from the subprocess definition are the same that you maintain for the RFC destination under Define Inbound Dest. in transaction SBGRFCCONF.

Step 2: Assign Default bgRFC Subprocess to Replication Objects

This step is the first Central Finance specific step. Before you activate bgRFC for your interface, it is important to maintain a default subprocess for your replication object, otherwise the AIF message cannot be processed in your Central Finance system.

This you do in the customizing activity AIF Runtime Configuration -> Settings for bgRFC -> Assign Default bgRFC Subprocess to Replication Objects. In the list you see all replication object, that support the AIF processing using bgRFC

Optional Step 3: Assign Default bgRFC Subprocess to Replication Objects

As mentioned earlier, it is recommended to use different subprocesses for different logical systems and/ or company codes to allow activation and deactivation of AIF processing on a fine granular level. This is recommended e.g. for the IDR initial load, because with this setup you can stop processing for the new company codes, while the online replication is still running for your other company codes.

The relevant setting is done in the customizing activity AIF Runtime Configuration -> Settings for bgRFC -> Assign Specific bgRFC Subprocess for Accounting Interface. If you compare it with AIF background jobs then this is same what you do in the customizing activity “Assign AIF Runtime Configuration Group for Replication Object”.

In the example I assigned different company codes to different subprocesses.

Step 4: Activate AIF bgRFC for Existing Interfaces

This step I see as last step in the sequence, because you should define the default subprocess before you activate the bgRFC processing for a specific interface to avoid processing errors.

As long as you do not set the indicator for any of the AIF Accounting Interface (AC_DOC, AC_DOC_CHG and AC_DOC_TMP) it still used the background jobs for processing. Once you have completed the configuration described in Step 1 to 3, you can set the indicator “CFIN: bgRFC Active Indicator” in AIF Runtime Configuration -> Activate AIF bgRFC for Existing Interfaces to activate bgRFC for the interface. 

Note:
When this flag is set, then the interface version 10 is used in the AIF Error Monitor and the AIF Interface Monitor. This means that you have to use the interface version 10 to select errors in the AIF error monitor and in the AIF interface monitor. The AIF messages, which were created before the switch to bgRFC are displayed under interface version 2 (AC_DOC and AC_DOC_CHG) and interface version 1 (AC_DOC_TMP). This means, that you also have to add additional entries for the new interface in the customizing activity Settings for Accounting Document Replication -> Assign AIF Recipients to Accounting Interfaces

You can switch back to the classic AIF processing using background jobs, but you have to be aware, that then again the AIF messages use the previous interface version and you have to adjust your search in the AIF error monitor. 

The switch from AIF background jobs to AIF bgRFC processing and back has no impact on the Fiori apps Manage Pending Journal Entries , Manage Temporary Postings and Manage Pending Journal Entries - Message View. 

Step 4: Activating/ Deactivating the AIF Processing per Subprocess

When you now want to deactivate the AIF processing for a specific subprocess, e.g. because you want to execute the IDR initial load, then you have to go to the customizing activity AIF Runtime Configuration -> Settings for bgRFC -> Deactivate Processing per Subprocess.

To restart the AIF processing again, you use the report FINS_CFIN_AIF_BGRFC_RESTART. In the report you select the subprocess for which you want to start the processing again. 

 
Further links:

Online help for Central Finance

Online help SAP Application Framework

entry.title: Re: Activating Help Icon for SAP S4 Fiori
entry.content: not exactly true. The in-app help framework load is initiated by the Fiori Launchpad itself, once the plugin is enabled. If the in-app help question mark doesn't show for the particular fiori app this means there is no standard context help for it on help.sap.com or no custom help on the customer's SAP Enable Now system.

entry.title: Re: Performance Tips: Getting the most out of your Web Intelligence Processing Servers
entry.content:
Thanks, @Matthew_Shaw . Yes, that helps. Let me check with workflow you mentioned above. so the expected overall CPU usage with the 'heavy' workflow is not more than 50% (1 WIPS on 2 cores) - correct?

While you are at it -- wanted to pick your brain a little 🙂

How best can the metrics of WIPS be leveraged to asses the performance and use them for tuning? I see many metrics and sure they are valuable - but did not find any information how to interpret them.

For example: 

Number of documents opened from cache - what does it mean if the value never other than 0? Can it be interpreted as no cache being used and cache can be turned off to improve the performance of WIPS?

Current number of sessions - I think this metric means 'Maximum Connections' property - correct? Increase this WIPS property to be more than largest value - is that how it should be used?

Number of Cores - How many WIPS can/should be configured based on available cores? Follow Golden Rule: One Web Intelligence Processing Server per CPU core per machine

Cache size (Kb) - Is this cache work/applicable if a report is refreshed/exported using restful calls also, apart from BILP interactive usage?

Number of swapped documents - If there is non-zero number, would that indicate that WIPS is swapping documents and increasing the cache size would avoid it - is that correct interpretation?

 

Is any of the below metrics can be used to asses/tune performance?

Current number of client calls
Number of remote extension errors
Current number of tasks
Total number of client calls
Total number of tasks
Current number of active sessions
Number of documents
Number of document swap
Number of sessions timeout
Total number of sessions
Number of users
Number of active threads
Total number of threads

entry.title: Re: Where to start
entry.content:
Hi @autiger30 
You can build the skills you nee at your own pace; explore our Learning Journey and search the topic that fits your interest.

In addition I want to draw your attention to our Beginner Corner. This Learning Group is an interactive virtual space dedicated to beginners, students and lecturers studying on learning.sap.com.
There the Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates) might be beneficial you. 

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Creation of a Work Permit Using Create Work Permit Request App (App Id: F4691)
entry.content:
Work Clearance Management (WCM) solution consists of required tools and processes that help in overseeing and ensuring safety at a work location. WCM can be used to monitor the safety measures and ensure safe working conditions for the workers at work sites.

The WCM solutions can be accessed with the Permit to Work application in SAP FIORI launchpad.

The Permit to Work Fiori apps offer an enhanced and simplified work permit management solution that provides a systematic approach to identify and control the risks in hazardous areas and ensure a safe working environment for the employees who are involved.

A Work Permit is a formal printed document with a description of the work, the requirements to be fulfilled and the safety measures to be taken. Work Permit authorizes the worker to carry out the specific work at a specific time. This is like an agreement between the issuer and the receiver about the conditions, risks, and precautions involved.

Using Permit Work solution in WCM users can create, process, and monitor work permits.

Permit to Work helps to streamline the work permit management process with the following Fiori applications:

Create Work Permit Request: You can use this app to create a new work permit with reference to an existing maintenance order, a predefined work permit template, or independently.

Manage Work Permits: You can use this app to create new permits or manage the existing work permits that are active, non-active, or closed in the system.

Manage Work Permit Templates: You can use this app to create new work permit templates or manage the existing templates.

This article will show steps to create a work permit with an existing work order using the Create Work Permit Request Fiori app.

  • Click on the Create Work Permit Request tile. Enter Planning Plant, Work Permit Type, and Reference Maintenance Order number and press the Continue button.

  • Under the General Information tab most of the fields will be pre-populated from the Maintenance Order. Update the information if needed.

  • Update the Nature of Work by checking applicable check boxes.

  • Add additional Technical Objects like Equipment and Functional Locations under the Object List tab.

  • Add Safety Requirements to be implemented before carrying out the maintenance work and required Personal Protective Equipments under the Safety Requirements tab.

  • Add additional Maintenance Orders under the Assigned Orders tab if required.

  • Update Person Responsible under the Partner tab.

  • Approvals will be pre-determined automatically under the Approvals tab. If needed user can add additional approvers if required.

  • Click on the Create button at the bottom to create the Work Permit.

Result: Work Permit will be created.

entry.title: Re: While i try to check the Table level data like MARA/E...
entry.content:
Hi,

These are SAP standard tables not transaction, please use se16n and then add MARA or EINA and execute it.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop 'Accelerate Clean Core Journey' (March 19, 2024)
entry.content:
Onsite at SAP America’s Headquarters

3999 West Chester Pike, Newtown Square, PA 19073

March 19, 2024

Agenda

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop focusing on ‘Accelerate your journey to Clean Core with SAP MaxAttention’ taking place on-site on March 19, 2024. Please find the current agenda here.

In this workshop, you will learn about

  • Definition and dimensions of clean core (Business Processes, Extensibility, Integration, Data and Operations)
  • KPI’s for the respective dimensions and value aspects
  • Tools and MaxAttention services that will help drive and govern your journey to clean core

For customers planning their transformation to SAP S/4HANA, customers who are already live on SAP S/4HANA carrying over the technical debt from ECC or customers who implemented SAP S/4HANA as a re-implementation or a greenfield implementation, this is an opportunity to become cloud ready and run with cloud compliant extensions and customizations to

  • Provide flexibility to adopt to changing business requirements with modular innovation and functionality decoupled from the core
  • Ease of upgrade: Make upgrades non-events from a custom code point of view
  • TCO: efficient use of infrastructure and licenses
  • Promoting fit-to-standard compliance with clean core modular innovation
  • Future proof and cloud ready solution

The workshop followed by a dinner, is a great opportunity to meet colleagues from other companies and key representatives from SAP.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

The health and well-being of our customers, employees, and business partners is a top priority for SAP. As a response to the restrictions regarding travel and physical events caused by COVID-19, we offer a virtual event format which allows you to have an interactive, digital experience in a safe environment.

Engage with us - Register for this workshop

In case you want to register for this workshop or need any further information please reach out to maxattention@sap.com

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: It's possible to connect SAP HANA CLOUD TRIAL with PowerBi?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I would like to know, if is possible to connect SAP HANA CLOUD TRIAL with PowerBi?
Because I am getting this error, and I don't know what to do.
Failed to save modifications to the server. Error returned: 'Erro do OLE DB ou do ODBC : [DataSource.Error] ODBC: ERROR [S1000] [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB DLL][HDBODBC] General error;258 insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guid '8B6E9BCE5E89814EAF1980EA3B9E59EB'. '.

I'm trying to get the data from a container in Hana, because I have an application in SAP BAS with the SAP Hana

entry.title: Adding a Standard field/ custom field to the standard SD Migration cockpit templates.
entry.content:
In this blog, we will discuss the step-by-step process to add a Standard field/ custom field to the standard SD Migration cockpit templates.  

Eg: While uploading the Open Sales orders Header currency field won’t be there, so to change the currency we can add the currency field to the template and upload. Along with the Currency field, we will add the below fields as well.

  1. Header Data – Shipping type, Currency Key, Your reference.
  2. Item Data - Sales Unit, Item Number of the Underlying PO, Storage Location

Procedure:

  1. Create a Project (Migrate using Staging Tables) to upload Sales orders.

 

  1. Input Project Name. Search and Select the Migration object SO- Sales order (Only open SO) to upload Sales orders and Save.

 

2.Goto LTMOM tcode, Select the project created and go to edit mode.

3. Select Source Structures and select Header data on the right screen. Click on highlighted Add Field to add the custom fields in the template.

4.Add the required fields like shown below.

5. Similarly, add other fields to corresponding source structures.

6.Once all the required fields are added, the field mapping is to be performed (The added fields are to be linked to the corresponding target structure fields (FM field)). Goto Field Mapping and on the right side the Target structures will be displayed. Drag the added field from the source structure and map the same to the corresponding field in Target Structure. Follow the same process and link all the added fields.

Note: All the fields which we are adding should be available in the source structure.  

 

 

Author 

M Tharun Kumar

entry.title: Re: Activating Help Icon for SAP S4 Fiori
entry.content:
Hi @AngadJadhav ,

The in-app help (SAP Companion) question mark appears when the context help for the application is available. In a scenario, where the customer uses the standard (free) in-app help, SAP Companion checks it on help.sap.com. When the customer has the SAP Enable Now system and set it up as a repository for SAP Companion, the framework sends requests to both repositories. If they respond with no content - no question mark icon will appear.
If you want the in-app help icon to stay even when no context help is available, add the noHelpMode=carousel; to the values in the PARAMETERS field of the SAP Companion configuration.

entry.title: Delivery Split for Outbound Delivery Orders in Advanced Shipping and Receiving during loading
entry.content:
Delivery Split for Outbound Delivery Orders in Advanced Shipping and Receiving during loading with example and system set up, WMS-TMS work hand in hand:

Short Story: Load Planning certainly changed in shipping on many occasion when priorities pop up (to ship stocks due to emergency) even though planned stocks are picked, packed, staged and ready for loading of Customer Orders, so need flexible tool to load first priority stocks based on the route sequence of the truck and load rest of stocks until truck fully occupied for customer fulfilment orders. Example in this video will exhibit how Final loading indicated in RF tool when truck is fully occupied (no space to take further pallets) in response of that, the original delivery documents/freight units split and new documents created (Warehouse delivery, LE delivery, Freight unit) and already unloaded Handling units of the documents assigned to new documents.

Important System Set up:

SPRO PATH

DocumentationAllow Delivery Split in ASR

Reference: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/499bf6bad0e246eda48981a44c8796ac.html 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/advance-shipping-and-receiving-planning-and-execution-using-unified-package/bc-p/13616953/emcs_t/S2h8ZW1haWx8dG9waWNfc3Vic2NyaXB0aW9ufExTWUtGTVpYSzVFMkFPfDEzNjE2OTUzfFNVQlNDUklQVElPTlN8aEs#M166160

Responsibility:- I demonstrated only tools, system behaviour and actual end customer process steps would vary depends on business need.

Questions and feedback would be highly appreciated! 

Thank you!

Best,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Quantities in custom analytical query
entry.content:
Hello Floyd,

I don't see Sales Order & Item Number in your screen shots. I would suggest you to focus one one a few specific Sales Order & Item Numbers examples and compare with the SAP S/4HANA system if you have access it.

I don't see any information about association _I_OutboundDeliveryItem here in Sales Order Item - Cube 

With Sales Orders and Outbound Deliveries there might be (1) partial delivery scenario - one sales order item can have multiple delivery items  (2) Deleted, canceled sales orders, items & delivery, items scenario

These two scenarios above should be considered. The partial delivery scenario will cause your sales order items measures double! 

Hope the information helps.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: How can I do the subcontracting product return process?
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer to the below thread and I hope it will asnwer your question.

Solved: Subcontracting Returns process - SAP Community

Thanks,

entry.title: How to add a new field to Business Volume Selection Criteria?
entry.content:
When creating a condition contract, we select the sales criteria of that condition contract with the Business Volume Selection Criteria.

The standard Business Volume Selection Criteria in the system may not match the customer's needs.

In this case, we can create this need by adding new fields to the Business Volume Selection Criteria

SAP IMG (SPRO)

Logıstıcs- General> Settlement Management> Condition Contract Management> Condition Contract Settlement > Define and Configure Field Combinations for Business Volume Selection

 

In the meantime, we need to get a good customer analysis. Does the user need to add a new Business Volume Selection Criteria or add a new field to the existing Business Volume Selection Criteria?

We can add either way

If they want a new Business Volume Selection Criteria, we select new entries. If they want to add a new field to the existing Business Volume Selection Criteria, we create it by copying it from the existing one.

Suppose in our scenario we want to give the following options together

a field that is not in the billing type standard Business Volume Selection Criteria

there are others but not under one choice

Sales organization- Customer- Billing Type-Material Group

We can copy the sales organization or customer by selecting the line with the customer

We write the field names in the description by giving the appropriate number from the number sequence

Than press enter and click oke

It was created. Select the line and click the Field Assignment

Fields and click enter, you will get the following error

even if the billing type is a standard field, it gives an error because it has not been added before

If you want to add a Z* field, you can follow the same steps

Copy WB2_S_BVB_FIELDCAT and go to SE11 paste data type and click change

Find append structure

Double click ZZAPPEND and add FKART field and press enter-activated

Go back and we can see our field on chart

We came back to the customization field and when we said enter, it took the field and did not give an error and data was saved.

And Define and Configure Sets of Field Combinations

SAP IMG

Logıstıcs- General> Settlement Management> Condition Contract Management> Condition Contract Settlement > Define and Configure Sets of Field Combinations

Click new entries

Write Field comb. Number press enter and save

Go to transaction WCOCO for create a new Condition Contract and we can see new entries at Business Volume Selection Criteria

And we can give selection criteria

I would be happy to read your thoughts and comments and if there are better ways to fulfil the requirement, please leave them in the comment section below.

Thanks so much!

entry.title: Cloud Integration - How to Manage Abnormally Large Files with SFTP Adapter and SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
This blog provides a comprehensive guide for users seeking a solution for processing large files from an SFTP source and transferring the data to a HANA Database. The solution outlined in this guide employs SAP Integration Suite. There have always been challenges associated with processing large files, which may include issues related to performance, memory usage, and overall efficiency. All of which are solved by the solution shared in this guide.

 

Background Information

During a recent migration project - we were challenged with designing a solution that eliminated a previously designed integration using Informatica Platform. Replacing it with SAP BTP Cloud Integration Suite, during the migration project a crucial task emerged: retrieving large files from an external SFTP and seamlessly loading the data into a HANA Database On-Premise table.

 

Systems and Platforms

  • SAP BTP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration): Integration Platform.
  • SAP HANA Database On-Premise: Target destination for the data.
  • External SFTP (SSH File Transfer Protocol): Source location for the large files.

Business Requirement

Regularly monitor the external SFTP folder for incoming files, and upon detection, initiate the seamless transfer of data to the HANA Database On-Premise table through SAP Cloud Integration. The graphic below is a diagram the represents the solution we deployed.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

The Challenge with this Integration

While handling file processing within SAP Cloud Integration is generally straightforward and handled seamlessly by the platform. Challenges arise when dealing with large files, approximately 400MB or larger. Depending on the environment's capacity, unforeseen issues may occur, such as messages becoming stuck in processing status and being automatically aborted after 24 hours without completion.

Providing a specific recommendation on the maximum initial file size is challenging. Memory consumption varies significantly based on individual data content and processing step characteristics. Operations such as csv-to-xml conversion and message-mapping process the payload as a whole, resulting in considerable memory usage.

To address this, it is advisable to divide the input into manageable chunks for more efficient processing.

 

Solution Implemented

The solution we implemented involves utilizing the General Splitter capability, where two instances of General Splitter were employed.

(General Splitter splits a composite message comprising N messages into N individual messages based on configured conditions refer: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/general-and-iterating-splitter)

The first one was responsible for breaking down the original input files into smaller pieces, while the second one facilitated sending the data to HANA in batches. This approach enables parallel processing with a defined number of concurrent processes, allowing the complete payload or data to be efficiently sent to HANA.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

1 - SFTP Sender to trigger the iFlow

2 - File General Splitter to process a quantity of records per time (for example, a file with 1.000.000 rows will be split  in 10 branches of 100.000)

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

  • Grouping: number of rows in each block
  • Parallel Processing: to enable the parallel processing
  • Number of Concurrent Processes: number of threads executing in parallel

3 - Convert the original payload CSV to XML (using the standard function)

4 - Graphical mapping to create SQL XML payload to HANA (field transformation to meet HANA format) Referral document for detail: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/5cf7d2de571a45cc81f91261668b7361/2e96fd3f2d14e869e10000000a155106.html?version=7.5.4)

5 - JDBC General Splitter to send to HANA a quantity of records per time (batches)

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

6 - Send the data to HANA

7 - Gather to merge all the HANA responses

8 - Gather to merge all the records processed

9 - Exception Handling sending an alert email to a distribution list. Afterwards the escalation event is raised

 

Benefits/Advantages of the implemented solution

This solution utilizes an approach that harnesses the strengths of SAP Cloud Integration while addressing common challenges associated with data processing and integration. The emphasis on parallelization, error prevention, and leveraging out-of-the-box capabilities contributes to the efficiency, reliability, and scalability of the overall solution.

 

Conclusion

Overall, the solution not only meets the specific requirements of the migration project but also sets the foundation for a robust and configurable data integration framework. This approach facilitates seamless data flow from external sources to the HANA Database, emphasizing reliability, scalability, and effective handling of potential challenges associated with large file processing.

 

I would be more than happy to hear from our SAP Community about similar experiences with this or other integration requirements.
Please share your feedback in the comments below. I welcome any thoughts you may have on this solution. I encourage you to share similar requirements and how you solved them.

Thank you for reading!!

 Fellipe Mendes

entry.title: Re: manage free goods in purchasing contract.
entry.content:
Hi,

When you create a PO there a check box for free items, you need to click on the box in order to consider as free of charge.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Error in Trigger
entry.content:
Hello community,
This request is a trigger which was created on the [@SUIVI_COLIS] table. The trigger is fired when there is an update on the table.

In this case, the trigger checks if certain fields (U_Date, U_Quart, U_Colis, U_PO, U_PRI, U_VM, U_Grade, U_PB, U_N_Odre_Prod, U_Lot, U_ML, U_Dirt, U_Ash, U_Nitro, U_Grade_F and U_CHEQ) have been updated and if the status is "C". If these conditions are met, an error is returned and the transaction is rolled back, meaning the changes will not be made.

This is a security measure to prevent certain fields from being modified when the status is "C". Does this answer your question

But it doesn't turn out as expected.
it is triggered each time an update is carried out regardless of the status of the line.

Please help me resolve this issue.

ALTER TRIGGER [dbo].[BloquerModification_SUIVI_COLIS]
ON [dbo].[@SUIVI_COLIS]
FOR UPDATE
AS
BEGIN
    IF UPDATE(U_Date) OR UPDATE(U_Quart) OR UPDATE(U_Colis) OR UPDATE(U_PO) OR UPDATE(U_PRI) 
   OR UPDATE(U_VM) OR UPDATE(U_Grade) OR UPDATE(U_PB) OR UPDATE(U_N_Odre_Prod) OR UPDATE(U_Lot) 
   OR UPDATE(U_ML) OR UPDATE(U_Dirt) OR UPDATE(U_Ash) OR UPDATE(U_Nitro) OR UPDATE(U_Grade_F) OR UPDATE(U_CHEQ) 
   AND EXISTS  (SELECT 1 FROM inserted WHERE Status = 'C' AND [DocEntry] = inserted.[DocEntry])
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR('La modification des champs U_Date, U_Quart, U_Colis, U_PO, U_PRI, U_VM, U_Grade, U_PB, U_N_Odre_Prod, U_Lot, U_ML, U_Dirt, U_Ash, U_Nitro, U_Grade_F et U_CHEQ est interdite lorsque le statut est "C".', 16, 1)
        ROLLBACK TRANSACTION
    END
END

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: SAP CAL installation missing configuration in advance...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

DNS Settings option is available (if the Appliance Template supports it) only in case of allowed Public Static IP, which is not the case, when you have GatewaySubnet. We recommend you to delete the last one (GatewaySubnet), if it is not used. 

Best regards,

Tsvetinka

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere , Dataflow read from CSV, random numbe...
entry.content:
Hello @albertosimeoni,

Did it happen after the latest release 2024.5 of SAP Datasphere , when, today? I don't see any data integration or data flows enhancements in the latest release, check out What’s New in SAP Datasphere Version 2024.5 — Feb 27, 2024

Have your both quality and production tenants been updated the latest release already? 

Probably you are on something! I suggest you to apply your https://me.sap.com/ and submit an incident.

Regards,
Tuncay

I have entered some data to Rate %. But the Rate increase dollar is not getting calculated. Last column is Rate increase %.

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Quantities in custom analytical query
entry.content:
Hello @TuncayKaraca,

Thank you for your quick reply. The above screenshots are from one sales order.

The CDS views I_OutboundDeliveryItem and I_SalesOrderItemCube have a Join Condition on the fields:

Furthermore, I check and there are no partial deliveries. Every individual sales order item is in the same delivery (e.g. all items from line 30 are in one delivery).

I see that some changes were made to the sales orders, but I do not understand how that could affect the sales order quantity in the query.

Lastly, why are sales order item measures doubled when there is a partial delivery? Is this a big from SAP?

I just want to see the quantity that is in my sales order to be displayed in my query.

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Quantities in custom analytical query

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP ABAP Environment #10
entry.content:
👉 The call for contributions for one of the upcoming roundtables is open! 

 

If you want to show a demo or share a use case scenario for SAP BTP ABAP Environment send us an email and we will get back to you.
 

Introduction

 

As SAP BTP ABAP environment (aka Steampunk) and ABAP Cloud became more and more popular inside and outside of SAP, there is a high demand for rolling out the latest product news and updates, asking questions, and of course showing demos. 

💡 If you weren’t able to join one of our previous roundtables, you can find the slides presented,  recordings, and further references in this GitHub repository.

 

 



Meeting Information

When:                                                                      
  • March 19th, 4:00 - 5:00 PM CET  – Zoom Meeting (please register in advance) 
 
Who:
  • All interested customers, partners, and stakeholders are invited to join and exchange ideas and feedback with others and the product team
  • Steampunk team: Frank Jentsch (Product Lead for SAP BTP ABAP Environment), Guido Derwand & Arne Harren as the project leads for BTP ABAP infrastructure topics, Iwona Hahn & Burcu Karlidag

Preliminary Agenda:
  • Product news
  • New feature: Elastic Scaling of Applications Servers & Hyperscaler Support Update (including demo)
  • Q&A
Looking forward meeting you!
 
 

Check out our SAP Business Technology ABAP Environment page in SAP Community for product updates and upcoming events.

entry.title: Re: Table not found 'Company Info'(CINF) - SAP BUSINESS O...
entry.content:
The post is old but I think some further information is required.

The issue is described by note 3120212 - Log On to SAP Business One Client with Error After Delete and Restore Company Database Again

The escenario is not only the one described by the note, as of the latests versions of SAP B1 10.0 the issue continues and it happens just by importing an existing database with the same name without deleting it before that. 

The note has a workaround:

  • Delete the company DB, for example SBODEMOUS.
  • Log on to the Control Center and refresh the company list or open the SAP Business One client and refresh the company list in the Choose Company window.
  • Restore this DB with the same database name again.

However for a productive database this process seems unnecessarily risky, there's no need to delete the database instead as indicated by the solution given here:

1.- Export the affected company DB, even if it has the error "Table not found 'Company Info' (CINF)" just go ahead and export it.

2.- Import the database with the export you just created, do not rename the schema, do the import unto the same database with the same name. 

3.- Once the import is completed try to log in again it should be fixed.

This is exactly what the solution answer says just with more detail.

Hope it helps.

entry.title: Re: Print Multiple Copies and Staple Configurations
entry.content:
Hi Wajeeh,

as you did not provide the model you bought I hope you can find a proper device-type.

Afterwards have a look at https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2825343 to configure the staple function. Should not be a big thing. When using Adobe-Forms you are also able to send it within your spool request on a programmable basis..

Magic words to search for is "Print Tickets".

~Florian

entry.title: Discover How to Benefit from SAP Cloud Application Services
entry.content:
In this session, you will learn more about how SAP Cloud Application Services deliver a full spectrum of value-adding support and solution improvement services across multiple layers:

• Expert resolution of issues and adding value with a comprehensive portfolio ranging from stable application operations through higher value services, such as data management, release management, advanced monitoring, and SAP innovation adoption.

• Focused on SAP private cloud solution deployment models with a flexible and simplified service consumption.

Speaker:
Muni Lakshmi, Solution Management SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, SAP

entry.title: Advanced Filtering not possible on Account dimension in SAC
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 I'm working with a Planning Model and I'm building some stories with it. In this Planning Model I'm using an Account dimension (type Account) that has some attributes.

 

 

 

 

 I need to add an advanced filter and use the Account attributes to define a specific logical condition.

 However, even though I can use the Account attributes for simple filters ...

 

 

I cannot use the Account dimension neither the Account atrributes in the advanced filter panel:

 

 

 

Is this a by-design behavior? Is it planned that both the Account dimension and its attributes can be used in the advanced filter panel? What would be the best and lowest impact workaround to use Account attributes in advanced filter?

Please help me. Thanks

entry.content:
Hi All , I am trying to use Outlook SDK in the SAP build Process automation the step using Get Mail Body (Outlook) , however we are getting the below error message  :

{
    "type": "automationActivity",
    "name": "irpa_core.log",
    "label": "Log Email Body",
    "inputs": [
        "The Body of this Email conatins: undefined",
        {
            "key": "Info",
            "value": 0
 
Where as i am able to read the subject
Thanks,
Vijaya

entry.title: Transfer control - Between Supplier and "Center" (Plant)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Is there any standard transaction to view the material being transported between supplier and plant? I would like to know how much material the supplier sent me but is still in transport (I haven't done the Goods Receipt yet as it hasn't arrived at the plant)

This is necessary because when I execute my MRP I need to discount the material that the supplier has already sent me so as not to make a new request for the same quantity.

Tks!!!

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Advanced Formula
entry.content:
Make sure you have both Salary and rate % in Budget version. Also try adding MEMBERSET for other dimensions. If your dimension has members outside hierarchy add the CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY = [d/DimensionName1],[d/DimensionName2]

To narrow down the issue run it for one employee by hardcoding the memberset,

entry.title: Re: Store & Manage your Document Attachments through Fiori
entry.content: We tried to setup for manage journal entries app in fiori when we upload attachment and save it, they are saving in content server. But this attachments not showing in fb03 or oaad when we use DMS as source attachments in fiori. How we can fetch report for user and audit purpose in readable way so they can see document number, attachment info in one place. We see them in cv04n and dms related table DMS_PHF_CD1 but it is not like fb03. It will be great if you share insight what are benifit of dms setup to store attachments in content server and how everyone are fetching report when attachments not showing in fb03. If we have any SAP recommendation, please share.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK bind data to the List picker control from the...
entry.content:
Hi @bill_froelich,

To the first list picker I am setting the list from the Rule, values are defaulting when the Odata initialised successfully.

clientAPI.read("/OrderApp/Services/ORDERSERV.service", 'Orders', [],  '$top=5000').then(function(oData){
        let data = oData._array;
        if(data){
            data = data.map(({Code, Desc}) => ({
                DisplayValue: Code + ': ' + Desc ,ReturnValue: Code
            }));
            //clientAPI.getPageProxy().getControls()[0].getControl("ListPickder1").setPickerItems(data); -- Did this to set the data which is loading in the picker items and working
            //clientAPI.getPageProxy().getControls()[0].getControl("ListPickder1").setValue(["I47","I01"]); --- Tried this to default the values for testing. But the values actually defaulted are the 1st item from the list repeated twice as the two values set here
            // clientAPI.getPageProxy().getControls()[0].getControl("ListPickder1").reset(); -- Tried this to call the rule which will execute the Odata and populate 
        }
    });

 

// Defaulting the listpikcer values here
clientAPI.getPageProxy().getControls()[0].getControl("ListPicker1").setValue(arrayOfValues);

entry.title: Re: Compression of String in S/4HANA
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppi  Currently I am using rawstring to store compressed format. I have doubt on uncompress. How to uncompress back to string.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Filtering not possible on Account dimension...
entry.content:
@mayiya 

This is by design. Account dimension cannot be used in Advance Filtering. As a workaround Try creating a calculated dimension using attributes of Account dimension and see if that works in Adv Filtering 

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: How can I use @impl flag with typescript in cap?
entry.content: Have you tried to use the 'class' as implementation option described here: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/core-services#how-to-provide-custom-service-implementations ?

entry.title: Re: Welcome to Career Corner
entry.content: I have been in IT for 25 years. My wife is back in college and is almost finished with supply chain and marketing and she has been using SAP and I’ve had to help her navigate the software and it being my first time and being technologically sound I navigate it decently well. I would like to be a consultant as I’m nearing retirement with my current job with the school system. What route should I take? What certs and beginning learning do u need to go for?  So where do I begin if I want to be on the consulting side? Like help users navigate and support the software? Thank you so much

entry.title: Re: Highlights of Transportation Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 (FPS01)
entry.content: Nice to have Sales Order Scheduling back with even better usability.

entry.title: Re: SAP Managed integration gateway routing to multiple E...
entry.content:
Hi Mridul,

Thanks for your response. We had been integrating with single ECC system so far and it is due to migration that we will have to route to different ERP systems (the existing ECC and the migrated S4). In such scenarios, master data rationalization and managing unique master data should suffice?

entry.title: Re: Validation of standard data returns a validation erro...
entry.content: The validation rule SB00012 will validate the CTA postings with subitem 980. Looks like CTA rounding rules has the problem or check the CTA logs if anything posted with ZZZ type.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - How best to collect Testing Evidence?
entry.content:
When running a Test Case in Prepared Status in SAP Cloud ALM, how is Test Evidence normally collected? Do we set the Test Step to Pass with Conditions and collect Testing Evidence in the Comments field? See below. 

Or have other customers been uploading the Test Evidence as a Test Document in the Documents App? If in the Documents App, I assume they assign the same Process and Process Flow Variant used for the Test Case? 

Just curious how other customers have handled Test Evidence when testing via SAP Cloud ALM? 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Managed integration gateway routing to multiple E...
entry.content: Yes that should be fine.. In addition to we also need to verify few more things for e.g. PO Document number sequence etc. so it would require data rationalization not only for master data but transactional data as well

entry.title: Do we need to create Business user in SAP C4C to access Channel Partner Portal?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

Could you please let me know if we need to create business user in SAP C4C to access Channel Partner Portal.

 

Is the user who access Channel Partner Portal consumes C4C license?

 

Regards,

Muheed Syed

entry.title: Re: Transfer control - Between Supplier and "Center" (Plant)
entry.content:
Hi,

You may may make use of the ASN functionality with inbound delivery which will allow to monitor the delivery. Also, if you can use Transportation Management, it will allow to track the complete shipment. There are reports like VL06I (IBD report) or VT20 (shipment tracking), with all details.

However, if its for MRP -  if there is any new requirement generated, system will consider it and create new proposals - either PR or planned order in standard. You dont need to mark it whether its in transit or not.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to automatically assign tax code to account assin...
entry.content:
Hi,

Kindly check the blog: Defaulting Tax Code in PO - Condition Technique  in which the steps to default the tax code in the PO is explained in detail. You may use the same technique and configure new condition table with the account assignment field.

Regards,

I would like to be a consultant as I’m nearing retirement with my current job with the school system. What route should I take? entry.title: Alphanumerical number range for a sales order is not possible
entry.content:
We need to use an alphanumerical number range for our sales orders but the external flag in the following SSCUI is not editable:

 > 102819 Define Number Ranges For Sales Documents


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Alphanumerical number range for a sales order is not...
entry.content:
It is not possible to set the external flag for new number ranges, the flag is read only. 

Please check the following documentation which will provide you with a solution:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/a01254bea38949bba7d5835ffb4132dc.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Invalid Crystal Reports 2020 Key - My Network Blocking Authentication
entry.content:
Hi, will start off on what I am looking for.  Then add some color.

I need a list of all of the domains to whitelist that get used in the logging into the SAP page as well as when I try to install SAP Crystal Reports 2020 and try to get past the License key part.   My network is really locked down and somehow blocking some domain or subdomain that Crystal Reports is using to authenticate my License.   We have a locked down network and use something called Zscaler and probably some other stuff keeping us safe.  So I need to see if someone can provide me with domains to whitelist so I don't get the "Product Key is Invalid" message.

Color: I do have a valid product key.  SAP sales confirmed it and I installed the program on my personal laptop, no problem.  But on my work computer, I can not get past the Invalid key message.  Something on my side is blocking that traffic where they authenticate it.  We just can't figure it out.  Had someone tracing what is getting blocked today under my account and as I try to log into Sap.com and also try to validate my license, sites that are getting blocked are as follows so far (why are they using these...?)

socialize.gigya.com

crs.cr.adobe.com/pvb-preferences/win/intel

212-tcu-034.mktoresp.com

Now I can finally log into SAP.com (it just spun before) but I still can't authenticate my license key.   Most importantly, I really need to use Crystal Reports ASAP and if someone know what the pressing of the button after it asks for license key on the install is doing, please let me know.  What is the API or site that is responding back with Invalid key.  I suspect it is blocked on my side so it is not getting a response so it just by default says   "Invalid Key" and I need to tell then what else to whitelist.

entry.title: Re: Manufacturers part number not showing under purchasin...
entry.content:
Hi,

Looks like both are different material types - kindly check the OMS9 config for the MPN number field (field selection key 123 in standard) and ensure its enabled for input.

In addition, refer the blog # Control material master fields  for more info and the config steps.

Regards,

Please keep writing and keep sharing your expertise with the SAP community.

Geovana

entry.title: Business rule: get completed months/days of absences
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to get  the calulation of the full calendar months covered during the absences (so eclude partial months). Number of months or days, no matters.

 I used the function "Get Completed Months Of Time Types In Period()", but it provides only full month for a given Time type. 

we can have two or three unpaid absences that cover the entire month, and in this case the function doesn't work.  

We would like to be able to cumulate several absences to get completed months in a period. 

Any idea how I can that? I'm pretty new on Employee Central Time.

So your help would be really appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Regards, 

Sevda

entry.title: Re: datasphere intelligent lookup - error: No deployed ve...
entry.content: @morhardcThanks for the update. It's so really a bug. It's good to hear that it will be fixed in wave 2024.07 on March 26, 2024.

Hi David,

I am a holder of a bachelors degree in Marketing and I would like to do SAP SD.

Prince

entry.content:
Where can I find more information on Total Rewards and links to share with the customer? 

 

Thank you,

Kelley

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I recently graduated with an honours degree in Supply Chain Management and I have been going through different SAP Modules. This is a great initiative  and I would like to pursue Sourcing and Procurement. 

Thank you in advance.

Kind regards,

Thabani

entry.title: Re: Can multiple company codes post into the same cost center?
entry.content: You can post to a cost center belonging to a different company code only if CoCd Validation check box is NOT checked under OKKP

entry.title: Re: is it possible to configure P2P for multiple systems...
entry.content:
Yes you could do as many as you like to have 

please consider the followings 

1. tocde DRFIMG - Tech/Biz System , make sure you define logical and  RFC destination and attach the your tech/Biz system 

2. The Business System name defined in DRFIMG is exact name as in 'provider system' in SOAMANAGER

3. Configure SOAMANAGER 'local integration scenario ' as section of service group is where you could assign which target system ( consumer / client ) the system which will receive your outbound replication 

 

Check various blogs that detail who to configure Provider System

entry.title: Re: While i try to check the Table level data like MARA/EINA, it shows that transaction does not exi
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: While i try to check the Table level data like MARA/EINA, it shows that transaction does not exi
entry.content: Hi, Use T code SE11 or SE 16 or Se16n and then type the table name MARA or EINA to see the details.

entry.title: Re: DWC Local Connection to SQL-Server Dataflow not working
entry.content:
Hi @CKnall 

I am seeing this error - Data Flows: The user aborted a request.

What did you fix to get past this issue?  Data Flow used to work for me in the past but am seeing this error now.

Thanks

-ravi

entry.title: Re: BSEG-SKFBT in Accounting Document
entry.content:
Hi, transaction VF01. 

If possible, which EXIT's I can handle this field during SD billing accounting.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Handle console error message 'dateValue does not matc...
entry.content:
Hi Piotr,

 

I think the error message tells you what the issue is. From backend you set the maxDate as Dec 31, 9999. While the datepicker is picking a datetime not just a date. You compare dates with datetimes. Can you adjust that and see if the error is gone. So you provide the same format DD/MM/YYYY HH:mm:ss. Something like this.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Manufacturers part number not showing under purchasing tab in material master
entry.content: MPN is to be set up as MPN profile in SPRO under MM->
